project: Create comprehensive test infrastructure for all repository tests. Create internal/testutil package with database helpers, Redis helpers using testcontainers, and mock S3 storage for storage-service tests. Add Makefile targets: 'make test-db' starts PostgreSQL and Redis, 'make test-all' runs all tests with dependencies, 'make test-integration' runs only integration tests. Add scripts/test-env.sh for quick test environment bootstrap. Document test setup in CONTRIBUTING.md. This ensures any developer can run full test suite without manual infrastructure setup.
